NEWAYGO COUNTY ROAD COMMISSION AND AMATEUR RADIO REPORT 20 TO 25 TREES OF VARYING HEALTH AND SIZE CAME DOWN JUST NORTH OF FREMONT. THE LUDINGTON DAILY NEWS IS REPORTING NUMEROUS TREES ARE DOWN IN LUDINGTON STATE PARK...CAUSING DAMAGE TO CAMPER TRAILERS...VEHICLES...AND POSSIBLY A PARK BUILDING AS WELL. TREES ARE DOWN IN A WEST TO EAST ORIENTATION FROM THE LIGHTHOUSE TOWARD THE PARK ENTRANCE. SOME ARE ROTTEN BUT MANY ARE IN GOOD HEALTH AND AROUND ONE FOOT IN DIAMETER BUT POSSIBLY LARGER. PARK OFFICIALS ARE PERFORMING A DAMAGE SURVEY AND MAY HAVE MORE INFORMATION LATER TODAY.
